index.heading: Explore the possibilities of new technologies
index.mode_ted_tooltip: Starting from a technology, explore the societal, industrial, and business challenges it can address. Identify opportunities by connecting emerging technologies with unmet needs, market trends, and real-world problems.
index.mode_social_problem_tooltip: Starting from a social issue, directly generate a tree of relevant solution approaches and technology applications. Papers, patents, and use cases start enriching after generation begins.
index.mode_fast_tooltip: Visualize the technology as a hierarchical tree of functions, components, and subsystems. Decompose the architecture layer by layer to understand the building blocks required for implementation.
index.mode_query_tooltip: Starting from your query, draft a comprehensive report covering the technology’s fundamentals, market landscape, historical evolution, architecture, and key challenges. Gain a multi-dimensional understanding of how the technology works and where it fits in the broader ecosystem.
index.placeholder_query: Enter a query and we'll write up a report to get a full picture.
index.placeholder_ted: Explore scenarios and technologies around a topic
index.placeholder_fast: Break down how the technology works
index.toast_tree_generation_failed_desc: Couldn't process the tree — give it another try.
index.toast_duplicating_desc: A copy is already in progress — hang tight.

trl.level_3_description: Analytical and experimental critical function and/or characteristic proof of concept
trl.level_4_description: Component and/or basic subsystem validation in laboratory environment
trl.level_5_description: Component and/or basic subsystem validation in relevant environment
trl.level_6_description: System/subsystem model or prototype demonstration in relevant environment
trl.level_7_description: System prototype demonstration in operational environment
trl.level_8_description: Actual system completed and qualified through test and demonstration
trl.level_9_description: Actual system proven in operational environment
trl.level_1_description: Earliest stage. Scientific research begins to be translated into applied R&D.

trl_modal.no_data_hint: TRL is calculated during scenario analysis

market_structure.title: Market Structure
market_structure.fragmented_description: Many players, no single dominant entity

tech_advantage.high_description: Has capabilities that are fundamentally impossible with existing technologies, or surpasses existing technologies by an order of magnitude on key performance indicators. Even when naming specific alternatives, it can be demonstrated that those technologies cannot reach this domain.
tech_advantage.medium_description: The functionality is achievable with existing technologies, but there is a quantitatively clear advantage (e.g., 2–10x improvement) in performance, efficiency, cost, or applicability. The differentiation from existing technologies can be specifically explained.
tech_advantage.low_description: Equivalent or superior functionality/performance has already been achieved or is achievable with existing technologies. The differentiation factor cannot be demonstrated in principle or quantitatively.

uiOptimization.description: Major rendering improvements across the app. Tree visualization is now up to 3× faster for large trees.

chatAssistant.description: Chat with your technology tree. Select nodes and ask questions to get instant AI-powered insights about your research.

topSearchResearch.title: Research Context Mode
topSearchResearch.description: Sharpen your research focus before creating a tree. Get more accurate, relevant results by clarifying your objectives upfront.

ipAllowlist.summaryUser: Users with no entries have no IP restriction (opt-in). Supports IPv4 and IPv6.
ipAllowlist.summaryTeam: Register or remove the same IP address for every team member at once. Diffs between members are shown below under "Team IP coverage".
ipAllowlist.cidrHelp: Enter a single IP (e.g. 203.0.113.10, 2001:db8::1) or a range in CIDR notation (e.g. 203.0.113.0/24, 2001:db8::/32). Both IPv4 and IPv6 are supported.
ipAllowlist.descriptionHelp: Leave a note so future admins know what this entry is for.
ipAllowlist.aggregateFetchFailures: Failed to load {{count}} members. The view may be incomplete.
ipAllowlist.emptyTeamEntries: No IP entries registered for any team member.
ipAllowlist.emptyUserEntries: No entries — this user is currently unrestricted.
ipAllowlist.bulkAddConfirmBody: Register CIDR {{cidr}} for all {{count}} members of team "{{name}}". Members who already have it are skipped.
ipAllowlist.bulkDeleteConfirmBody: Delete CIDR {{cidr}} from all {{count}} members of team "{{name}}". Members without it are skipped.
ipAllowlist.errorConflict: This IP address is already registered
ipAllowlist.errorIpRestricted: Your current source IP is not permitted
ipAllowlist.selfLockoutAddBody: Your current source IP is {{sourceIp}}, but the CIDR you're about to register ({{cidr}}) does not include it. You currently have no other allowlist entry that covers your IP, so registering this CIDR will likely return 403 on your next API call.
ipAllowlist.selfLockoutDeleteBody: Your current source IP is {{sourceIp}}. Deleting this entry ({{cidr}}) removes the only allowlist entry that covers your IP — you may receive 403 on subsequent API calls.
ipAllowlist.selfLockoutBulkAddBody: Your current source IP is {{sourceIp}}. The CIDR ({{cidr}}) does not include it, and you have no other team-visible entry that covers your IP (a personal entry outside this team would not show here). Proceeding may lock you out.
ipAllowlist.selfLockoutBulkDeleteBody: Your current source IP is {{sourceIp}}. This CIDR ({{cidr}}) is registered on your own row and currently covers your IP — deleting it removes your last covering entry and may return 403 on subsequent API calls.
ipAllowlist.selfLockoutTeamCaveat: (Allowlist entries registered outside this team are not visible from this view.)
ipAllowlist.selfLockoutSourceIpUnknown: Source IP not yet known — self-lockout cannot be evaluated. Try again in a moment.

ipRestricted.title: Access not allowed
ipRestricted.body: This service is not accessible from your current source IP.
ipRestricted.hint: Please reconnect from an allowed IP range (office, corporate VPN, etc.) or contact your administrator.
